title: Cursed Tides
description: High-seas adventure mod based on the Pirates of the Caribbean movies. Working cannons!
body:
**_JOIN OUR DISCORD TO  GIVE   ANY  FEEDBACK AND SUGGESTIONS   ON THE MOD,   HELP   WITH   ISSUSES AND UPDATES!_**


Description

 ** A brand new minecraft experience**

 

This mod is heavily based on the Pirates Of The Caribbean movies, and has working cannons, custom weapons, custom armor sets with unique abilities and so much more!  Will you rise to become a legendary pirate, or fall victim to the cursed tides? The choice is yours in this high-seas adventure mod! 

To use the cannons you need to have cannonballs in your inventory and rightclick the cannon with the "stick of fire". Other features in the mod are pretty self-explanatory. 






Mod requires GeckoLib

_Cursed Tides is best enjoyed when playing with "Eureka!" _

_(Cursed Tides is still on alpha and has lots of bugs and unfinished features. Any feedback is appreciated!.)_
